case_title: CHIN, HARRY et al vs. MARCHAK, STEPHANIE

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, HARRY CHIN, JENNIE SERVED APR-14-1995, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MARCHAK, STEPHANIE
